# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe the change in 1-3 bullets.

## Type

- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Skill rules
- [ ] Example or demo
- [ ] Script
- [ ] Maintenance

## Non-engineer clarity check

- [ ] The wording is understandable without coding knowledge.
- [ ] “Changed” and “verified” are clearly separated.
- [ ] The output includes a next prompt the user can copy.
- [ ] Examples use fictional or sanitized content only.

## Local checks

- [ ] `python3 askproof/scripts/doctor.py`
- [ ] `python3 -m py_compile askproof/scripts/*.py`
